# Pull Request

## ⚠️ Important: This is a Fork

**This repository is a fork (reference copy) of [sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills](https://github.com/sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills).**

**⛔ Please do NOT submit PRs to this fork.** Instead:

🔗 Submit your PR to the **original repository**: [sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills](https://github.com/sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills)

---

## About This Fork

- ✓ This is a **reference/mirror fork** maintained for internal use
- ✓ We make **zero modifications** to original content
- ✓ We **automatically sync** with the original repository daily
- ✓ All changes go to the **original repo**, not this fork

---

## What This Fork IS

- ✓ Reference copy for offline access
- ✓ Compliance & legal documentation
- ✓ Automated mirror of the original project
- ✓ Attribution repository

## What This Fork IS NOT

- ✗ Active development repository
- ✗ Alternative to the original project
- ✗ Place to submit feature requests or fixes
- ✗ Maintained independently

---
